{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321135846663ECDE67598138E2EBA\"}"},"total":92},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7559584796609266457","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文字有种冷冽的诗意，在讲述残酷故事的同时，又不失美感。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760144286,"group_id":"7557057810106698777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Q2PK8E2j6Qb1OxlE4bqg4y7475Scj9gKNrr/BQjXCG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3780564690415268","user_name":"帝山的更始帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3780564690415268","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7557057810106698777","book_info":{"abstract":"李默，曾是普通人，直到那场车祸夺走妻子，也让李默成为中微子“钥匙”。胸口诡异的Ω-7印记，是他连接现实底层代码的权限。囚于神秘“基金会”，他周旋于冰冷的监视者、诡异的“影舞者”与古老的“守墓人”之间。他窥见帷幕之后——“织法者”的悲壮牺牲，“深海之影”的恐怖低语，世界竟是脆弱的织物。为寻亡妻痕迹，也为阻止现实崩塌，他必须驾驭印记之力，潜入信息深海，定位被隐藏的终极坐标。前路是吞噬意识的混沌，还是改写命运的希望？李默的抉择，关乎所有存在。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/22d3b5fb59f92b685e1f75b23632118e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"齐鲁古韵","author_id":"","book_id":"7557057810106698777","book_name":"月黑头鬼打墙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":747,\"name\":\"女频悬疑\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=747\u0026name=女频悬疑\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"cate
